groupings.title: Research to skill
groupings.description: Drop in a research pack; get validated, eval-first skills out - every claim verified against primary sources, never pasted.

groupings.title: Scaffold
groupings.description: A complete skills repository in one command - OSS hygiene, CI with a consumer-install gate, validation hooks, and skills.sh distribution wired from birth.

groupings.title: Author and ship
groupings.description: Eval-first authoring for any repo, and a deliberate, verified path to the skills.sh catalogue.
